# serialfiler.org

> Guide to serial bankruptcy filing -- waiting periods, restrictions, and repeat filer rules.

serialfiler.org is a free, open-source educational resource about serial bankruptcy filing restrictions. Part of the Bankruptcy Transparency Network.

## Pages

- https://serialfiler.org/: Overview of serial filing restrictions and waiting periods
- https://serialfiler.org/waiting-periods.html: All waiting periods between bankruptcy filings -- complete chart
- https://serialfiler.org/after-chapter-7.html: Filing again after Chapter 7 -- your options and timing
- https://serialfiler.org/after-chapter-13.html: Filing again after Chapter 13 -- your options and timing
- https://serialfiler.org/dismissed-vs-discharged.html: Dismissed vs discharged -- how outcome affects refiling
- https://serialfiler.org/calculator.html: Free calculator -- when can you file bankruptcy again

## Contact

This site is maintained by volunteers. No legal advice is provided.
